title: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh
impact: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh.

updates.content:
Title: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh

User impact: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh.

More info: After refreshing a Microsoft Fabric Semantic Model and the associated Excel PivotTable, previously selected filter values may be cleared and reset to default selections. No data loss has been identified; the impact is limited to retained filter selections within affected PivotTables.

Current status: We're investigating reports of previously applied filters resetting in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models after refresh operations. We've identified a recent service change associated with this behavior and are deploying a fix while monitoring its progress and effectiveness.

Scope of impact: Any user with Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may be affected by this issue.

Next update by: Monday, July 20, 2026, at 10:30 AM UTC

Title: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh

User impact: Users' filters in Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may reset after a refresh.

More info: After refreshing a Microsoft Fabric Semantic Model and the associated Excel PivotTable, previously selected filter values may be cleared and reset to default selections. No data loss has been identified; the impact is limited to retained filter selections within affected PivotTables.

Current status: We're continuing to validate the reported impact with affected users while reviewing additional information to refine the scope of impact. We're also validating a potential resolution and determining the appropriate next steps.

Scope of impact: Any user with Excel PivotTables connected to Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models may be affected by this issue.

Next update by: Monday, July 20, 2026, at 12:30 PM UTC
